name_cn:
NÉONOÉ BB Handbag #️⃣M46581
Exclusive global launch! This item is crafted with the same Italian custom process as the authentic version, featuring dynamic chip re-coding, original factory materials, and original factory light gold electroplated full steel hardware (color matches authentic).
Please compare with the authentic Italian version!
We ensure 100% authenticity! Original factory materials, hardware, edge oil, stitching + authentic craftsmanship + official website's latest full gift box!
20 x 20 x 13 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
Monogram coated canvas
Calfskin trim
Microfiber lining
Metal hardware
Drawstring closure
Strap: Removable, adjustable
Strap half-length: 33.0 cm
Strap half-length adjustable to: 56.0 cm
Handle: Single handle, removable
Made in Italy
